name: Brevo
tagline: Email, SMS, and CRM platform for growing businesses
description: Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) is an all-in-one marketing platform offering email, SMS, WhatsApp, live chat, and CRM. Known for its email-volume-based pricing (rather than contact-based), making it cost-effective for large lists.
pros: Pricing based on emails sent, not contacts
use_cases: You have a large contact list and are paying too much on Mailchimp — Brevo charges per email sent, not per contact stored
Your marketing mix includes email, SMS, and WhatsApp and you want all three managed in one platform
You need transactional emails (order confirmations, password resets) bundled with your marketing emails under one account
You're a small business that wants a built-in CRM and live chat without paying for separate tools
